title: Agora CLI JSON envelope (v1)
description: Stable JSON envelope shape returned by every JSON-mode `agora` command. Both success and failure responses use the same top-level shape so wrappers can branch on `ok`. Documented in /cli/md/automation.md and produced by internal/cli/envelope.go in the source repo.

ok.description: true on success, false on failure. Wrappers branch on this field; do not infer success from `error` absence alone.

command.description: Stable command label, e.g. "project create", "auth status", "init". Matches the `command` field of `agora introspect --json`.

data.description: Command-specific payload. Present on success. May be `null` for failure envelopes that have no partial payload, or a structured object when the command emits partial data alongside an error (e.g. `project doctor`).

meta.description: Always present. Contains transport-level metadata (output mode, exit code).

code.description: Stable error code from docs/error-codes.md, e.g. "AUTH_UNAUTHENTICATED", "PROJECT_NO_CERTIFICATE". Absent for unclassified errors.

httpStatus.description: Upstream HTTP status when the error originated from an Agora API call.

requestId.description: Upstream request ID for support escalations when available.

logFilePath.description: Absolute path to the rotating log file containing detailed context for this error.

outputMode.description: Always "json" for envelope responses (pretty mode does not emit envelopes).

exitCode.description: Process exit code the CLI will use after this envelope is written. 0 success; 1 generic error; 2 doctor warnings; 3 auth error; 130 user interrupt.

error.message: No local Agora session found. Run agora login first.
